title: dortmanna fastigiata
intro: Dortmanna fastigiata, also known as European pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects, making it a popular herbal remedy. The health benefits of Dortmanna fastigiata include reducing oxidative stress, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it accessible for those seeking natural remedies.
